chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.D-4876 of 2024 (Soneri Bank Limited through its authorized attorney(s) v. the State and others) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF THE JUDGE 1. For orders on Misc. No.21663/2024 2. For orders on office objection No.28 & 32 3. For orders on Misc. No.21664/2024 4. For hearing of main case 04.10.2024 Mr. Ghulam Ali Khan, advocate for the petitioner.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3-4. It is a case relating to the theft of a vehicle, the FIR whereof, the petitioner has sought to be quashed by this Court by way of the instant petition; the same could not be quashed simply for the reason that the subject vehicle was purchased by the private respondent on loan facility extended to him by the petitioner and it is false one. The police have the legitimate right to investigate a criminal case; such right could hardly be taken away. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine, directing the petitioner and his employees if any involved in the incident to prove their innocence by joining the investigation/trial, as the case may be. JUDGE JUDGE Nadir*
